full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 19.4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 13.35 ml DMEM/F12+++, 1.5 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 150 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++ for both conditions.

The final pellet was resuspended in 2 ml of media (dispase resuspended in iPDC media and sequential in DMEM/F12+++). For counting, a 1:10 dilution of the cell suspension was made.

Cell counts:

Made 1 aliquot with 1.5 E6 cells from the dispase dissociated cells.

Took all 142.8 E6 cells from sequential dissociation for enrichment with negative isolation.

Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 4x 5E6 cells

Sequentially dissociated, negative isolation flowthrough: 3x 1.08E6 cells

Labelled: S526_pOme2 1.08 E6 cells D+C&H Fib + End 24.02.2025 AE/MH

Combined cells (dispase dissociated cells + sequentially dissociated, negative isolation flowthrough cells): 3x 1 E6 cells

Labelled: S526_pOme2 1 E6 cells D+C&H Combined_d0_cult 24.02.2025 AE/MH

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

Magnetic-activated cell sorting (MACS)

Performed negative isolation for all obtained sequentially dissociatated cells. Cell count was 142.8 E6, and divided that into 3 equal fractions. Made the calculations assuming 50 E6 cells (in 3 separate fractions).

Negative isolation: Depleting the sample from cancer and immune cells using a mixture of anti-EpCAM (Miltenyi, Cat: 130-061-101) and anti-CD45 (TIL) beads (Miltenyi, Cat: 130-118-780), and an LS column in a QuadroMACS separator.

CD326 (EpCAM) MicroBeads, and CD45 MicroBeads protocols by Miltenyi Biotec were used as guidance.

MACS buffer was prepared as follows: 49.55 ml DPBS (w/o MgCl2 and CaCl2) + 250 µl FBS + 200 µl EDTA to have 0.5 % FBS and 2 mM EDTA in DPBS. MACS buffer was prepared sterile and sterile-filtered before using it.

MACS buffer, cells, and beads were kept on ice.

Everything was done inside a laminar hood to keep the cells sterile.

Centrifuged the cells at 300 g for 10 min at +4C.

The pellets were resuspended in 300 µl of cold MACS buffer (calculation: the desired volume [500 µl] - the volume of both beads [2x 100 µl]). Added 100 µl of both anti-EpCAM and anti-CD45 beads to the cell suspension and incubated 30 min at +4C shielded from light.

Washed the cells with 3 ml MACS buffer and centrifuged 1500 rpm (408 g) for 5 min at +4C. Lastly, the cells were resuspended in 500 µl of MACS buffer.

Placed three LS columns and 30 µm filters in the magnetic MACS Separator. Prepared them by washing them with 3 ml of MACS buffer, then applied the cell suspension onto the column, and washed with 3 x 3 ml MACS buffer.

Columns were removed from the separator and placed on a new 15 ml falcon tube. 5 ml MACS buffer was added to the column and with firmly pushing the plunger into the column, magnetically labeled cells were flushed out.

All cell suspensions were centrifuged 1500 rpm g for 5 min. Resuspended the flowthought cells in 1 ml iPDC media and the column-bound fracton in 2 ml DMEM/F12+++ media. Counted the cells.

Took 1.5 E6 cells from the flowthrough fraction for flow cytometry.

Combining dispase dissociated cells and cells from the flowthrough fraction

Combined 10 E6 dispase dissociated cells and 10 E6 cells from the flowthrough fraction

Took 6x 1.5 E6 aliquots for flow cytometry: 1x multicolor, 1x unstained, 4x FMOs

Cell culture

From the combined cells, 40 uL droplets were seeded to test whether the different cell types can be maintained in culture over time. In flat-bottom, non-treated, 6-well plates (CytoOne, Cat CC7672-7506), 8 droplets were seeded per well as follows:

Cell density in the droplets was 1000 cells/uL, for a total of 40000 cells/droplet. Ratio of dispase fraction to non-immune stroma-enriched fraction was 1:1.

Cells will be harvested at days 3, 7, and 9, using the dispase dissociation protocol.

To prepare the droplets, the following ratios were used:

The omentum gel in which the cells were embedded was from the Batch 3 received on 06.02.2025.

Calculations were done as follow:

1000 cells/uL * 40 uL = 40000 cells/droplet * 8 droplets/well * 6 wells = 1.92 E6 cells

1.92 E6 cells * (0.226 mL/ 8 E6 cells***) = 0.054 mL = 54.24 uL

*** This was the cell density in the combined cell suspension

40 uL * 8 droplets/well * 6 wells = 1920 uL -> Rounded to 2000 uL -> Made 4 x 0.5 ml eppendorfs

volume to take from cell suspension: 13.56 uL (= 54.24 uL/4)

ORG full medium → (500-136.6) = 363.4 uL

ome-gel → 110.5 µl

aprotinin → 1.5 µl

thrombin → 1.5 µl

fibrinogen → 10 µl

After plating, droplets were allowed to solidify for 60 min in the incubator, and when the time was up, 3.5 mL of complete media (iPDC media + cytokines) were added into each well.

Flow cytometry

The conditions to stain were:

DCM FMO

CD45 FMO

EpCAM FMO

CD31 FMO

dispase dissociated cells, MC

negative isolation flowthrough, MC

combined cells, MC

combined cells, unstained

The aliquots were stained with the following panel.

Washed cells once with 900 µl FACS buffer (centrifuge 6min 400 g at +4°C).

The antibodies were diluted in Brilliant stain buffer (#563794 BD Horizon),, 50 µl of the antibody mix was added to each sample, and the samples were incubated for 30 min at +4C shielded from light.

For the FMO samples, antibodymixes were prepared separately

After incubation, washed once with 900 µl FACS buffer.

Added 200 µl IC Fixation buffer (#00-8222 Invitrogen) to fix the cells and incubated for 40 min at +4°C shielded from light.

After incubation, washed once with 900 µl FACS buffer.

Resuspended in 900 µl FACS buffer for overnight storage.

Next morning, centrifuged and resuspended the cells in 400 µl FACS buffer.

Pipeted the cell suspension through a 5 ml Falcon polystyrene tube with a cell-strainer cap (blue).

Preparation of compensation controls

Used BD CompBeads Plus (7.5 µm) compensation beads.

Added one drop of both positive (BD CompBeads AntiMouse IgG, #51-9006274) and negative (CompBeads Negative Control #51-9006227) compensation beads to 5ml Falcon polystyrene round bottom tubes (white cap).

For stained compensation controls, 2 µl of each antibody was used.

the same antibodies except CD16-BV510 instead of BV510-DCM. l

Incubated for 30 min at +4°C shielded from light and resuspended to 350 µl FACS buffer.
